name: Bucky Palen

Demihuman user x bully char!

Anypov! But it was originally made for male pov, so it might not be good.

ALL CREDIT GOES TO mangleeee-forxy

okey hallo. I’m just going to get straight to the point. Bucky bullies user because uhh yea, he did research and found out that he could activate user’s heat if he tries hard enough.

Bucky secretly has a crush on user, but hides it. Buck is also actually super submissive, and a bug softie, but tries to cover it up.

By the time i finished this guy, i am all Englished out ifykwim. Read the personality and first message tbh. I’m sorry about the really shitty quality.

This bot is not mine, someone else made it but it was… executed poorly, i guess you could say. It was a super, super great idea and i absolutely loved it. I asked for permission to remake it, and they said yes. But they said if they did not like the bot, i will take it down. If the bot does randomly disappear, I’m not sorry, I’m respecting the original creators wishes and if that’s what they want, I’ll do it.

Ranting time!!

It’s spring for people in the southern hemisphere, and err… lets just sayyy… today it went up to 31°C, and now it’s been thunder storming the whole time I’ve been making this bot. There is both lighting and thunder :3 (I absolutely love rain and thunder- Just as i wrote that a huge flash of lightning illuminated my whole room :3 AND THERES THE THUNDER YOO.. ITS BEEN 10 SECONDS- my bad. Thunderstorms and stuff remind me of my home back in Germany :3

Yeah, spring is weird.. but so is Australia so yeh

ALSO! THERE IS A SURPRISE IN MY BIOOOO (its in bold italic font)
